name: EMA 20/50 Crossover Trend
entry_long: 20 EMA crosses above 50 EMA; price above 200 EMA; RSI(14)>50
entry_short: 20 EMA crosses below 50 EMA; price below 200 EMA; RSI(14)<50
exit_tp: TP at next key S/R; partial at 1.5R then trail 20 EMA
stop_loss: SL below last swing low (long) / swing high (short); ~1.5x ATR
indicator_settings: EMA default; RSI: 14-period, 50 level filter
notes: Classic trend entry; avoid ranging; confirm on D1 first

name: MACD + RSI Dual Momentum
entry_long: MACD crosses above signal line; RSI rises from <40 zone; price above 200 EMA
entry_short: MACD crosses below signal line; RSI drops from >60 zone; price below 200 EMA
exit_tp: TP at prior swing high; exit if MACD re-crosses or RSI hits extreme opposite
stop_loss: SL 5 pips below recent swing low; min 1.5x ATR
indicator_settings: MACD: 12,26,9; RSI: 14-period; EMA: 200
notes: 73% win rate backtested over 235 trades; both MACD AND RSI must agree

name: London Session Breakout
entry_long: Asian session range defined; price breaks above range high with momentum candle close outside range
entry_short: Price breaks below range low with momentum candle close outside range
exit_tp: TP = height of Asian range projected from breakout point; 1:1.5 minimum
stop_loss: SL inside range midpoint or 10-15 pips beyond opposite boundary
indicator_settings: ATR(14) for volatility sizing; range = 02:00-06:00 GMT
notes: Fake breakout risk high; avoid Asian range < 15 pips; skip NFP/FOMC

name: Fibonacci 50-61.8% Pullback
entry_long: In uptrend (price above 200 EMA); retrace to 50-61.8% Fib; bullish reversal candle
entry_short: In downtrend (price below 200 EMA); retrace to 50-61.8% Fib; bearish reversal candle
exit_tp: TP at previous swing high/low; use 1.272 or 1.618 Fib extension
stop_loss: SL 5-10 pips beyond 78.6% Fib level
indicator_settings: Fib drawn from swing high to swing low; 200 EMA trend filter
notes: Need bullish/bearish engulfing or pin bar at Fib zone

name: Pin Bar Price Action Reversal
entry_long: Bullish pin bar (long lower wick >= 2/3 candle) at support or 16 EMA touch
entry_short: Bearish pin bar (long upper wick >= 2/3 candle) at resistance or 16 EMA touch
exit_tp: TP at opposing S/R; partial at 1:1 then trail; or close when 8 EMA crossed back
stop_loss: SL at top/bottom of pin bar wick
indicator_settings: 16 EMA: default; Use NY close daily candles
notes: Wick must be >= 2/3 total candle; must be at a meaningful level

name: 3-Screen Triple Timeframe Trend
entry_long: Weekly uptrend -> Daily bullish structure -> H1 pullback entry at EMA or S/R
entry_short: Weekly downtrend -> Daily bearish structure -> H1 rally short at EMA or S/R
exit_tp: TP based on daily chart S/R; trail with H4 20 EMA
stop_loss: SL below H1 swing low; risk <= 2% account
indicator_settings: Three timeframes must align: W1 bias -> D1 timing -> H1 precision entry
notes: Eliminates 40% losing trades vs single-TF; all 3 TFs must align

name: RSI Divergence Reversal
entry_long: Price makes lower low; RSI makes higher low (bullish divergence); at support
entry_short: Price makes higher high; RSI makes lower high (bearish divergence); at resistance
exit_tp: TP at next swing high/low; exit when divergence resolves
stop_loss: SL beyond extreme of divergence swing; ~1x ATR
indicator_settings: RSI: 14-period; divergence must span >= 15-20 bars
notes: Divergence must span >= 15 bars; confirm with volume decline

name: Supply & Demand Zone Swing
entry_long: Price returns to demand zone (area of explosive upward move); bullish confirmation
entry_short: Price returns to supply zone (area of explosive downward move); bearish confirmation
exit_tp: TP at opposite S/D zone; minimum 1:2 RR
stop_loss: SL 5 pips below demand zone (long) / above supply zone (short)
indicator_settings: Identify zones from H4/D1 charts; zones from sudden explosive moves
notes: Combine with Fib 50% for higher probability; fresh zones = higher probability

name: Bollinger Band Mean Reversion
entry_long: Price touches lower BB (2 SD); RSI < 30; bullish candle confirmation
entry_short: Price touches upper BB (2 SD); RSI > 70; bearish candle confirmation
exit_tp: TP at BB midline (20 EMA); exit if price re-tests band
stop_loss: SL 5-10 pips beyond the band; ~0.5x ATR
indicator_settings: BB: 20-period, 2 SD; RSI: 14-period; 30/70 levels
notes: Only trade when BB is tight (squeeze); fails in strong trends

name: Ichimoku Cloud Swing System
entry_long: Price above cloud; Tenkan above Kijun; future cloud bullish; Chikou above price
entry_short: Price below cloud; Tenkan below Kijun; future cloud bearish; Chikou below price
exit_tp: TP at next cloud boundary or key S/R; trail Kijun-sen line
stop_loss: SL below Kijun-sen or cloud bottom
indicator_settings: Tenkan(9), Kijun(26), Senkou(52); some use 7,22,44 for forex
notes: JPY pairs respond best; all 4 conditions must align; steep learning curve

name: EMA 200 Dynamic S/R Pullback
entry_long: Price above 200 EMA; pulls back to touch/bounce 200 EMA; bullish candle closes
entry_short: Price below 200 EMA; rallies to test 200 EMA from below; bearish candle rejects
exit_tp: TP at prior swing high (1:2 min); trail 50 EMA after first TP
stop_loss: SL 15-25 pips beyond 200 EMA; ~1.2x ATR
indicator_settings: EMA: 200-period; ATR: 14-period for SL sizing
notes: Candle must CLOSE beyond EMA; avoid if 200 EMA is flat (ranging)

name: MACD Zero Line Cross
entry_long: MACD line crosses above zero line from below; H4 trend must agree
entry_short: MACD line crosses below zero line; align with H4 downtrend
exit_tp: TP at prior resistance; exit when MACD crosses back through zero
stop_loss: SL below last swing low; use ATR x 1.5
indicator_settings: MACD: 12,26,9 â€” use zero-line cross not signal-line cross
notes: Fewer signals than signal-line cross but higher quality

name: Inside Bar Breakout Continuation
entry_long: Inside bar forms in uptrend; entry on break above mother bar high
entry_short: Inside bar forms in downtrend; entry on break below mother bar low
exit_tp: TP at 1:2 RR based on mother bar range; or next key level
stop_loss: SL opposite end of mother bar (aggressive) or mid-point of IB
indicator_settings: No indicators needed; pure price action; identify trend on H4/D1
notes: Only trade with the trend; add EMA 200 qualifier

name: Stochastic + EMA Swing Entry
entry_long: Price above 50 EMA; Stochastic crosses up from <20 oversold zone
entry_short: Price below 50 EMA; Stochastic crosses down from >80 overbought zone
exit_tp: TP at next resistance / 1:2 RR; exit if stoch hits opposite extreme
stop_loss: SL 5 pips below last swing low (long); ~1x ATR
indicator_settings: Stochastic: 5,3,3 or 14,3,3; EMA: 50-period
notes: Works best on H4 in clear trend; avoid on choppy pairs like EURGBP

name: Fight the Tiger Weekly Reversal
entry_long: Large bearish weekly candle closes; open LONG at Monday open
entry_short: Large bullish weekly candle closes; open SHORT at Monday open
exit_tp: TP: 50-70 pips (fixed); close by Friday if not hit
stop_loss: SL: 100-140 pips from entry (fixed)
indicator_settings: Select pair with LARGEST candle body on weekly timeframe
notes: RR < 1 so requires high win rate; risky with 100-140 pip SL â€” not recommended

name: Trend Line Break & Retest
entry_long: Price breaks above descending trendline; retests it as support; bullish confirmation
entry_short: Price breaks below ascending trendline; retests it as resistance; bearish confirmation
exit_tp: TP at next key level or swing high/low; trail with 20 EMA
stop_loss: SL below retest candle low (long) / above retest candle high (short)
indicator_settings: Draw trendlines connecting 2+ swing highs/lows; 3 touches = stronger
source: LiteFinance Trendline Breakout, STS swing strategies
notes: Wait for the retest â€” break without retest = lower probability

name: OBV + Price Divergence
entry_long: Price makes new low; OBV does NOT confirm (higher low) = bullish divergence
entry_short: Price makes new high; OBV does NOT confirm (lower high) = bearish divergence
exit_tp: TP at next swing high/low; close if OBV confirms price move
stop_loss: SL beyond the price extreme used in divergence
indicator_settings: OBV: default settings; look for 2+ bar divergence
notes: Tick volume in forex != true volume; still useful for trend confirmation

name: Sonic R System (3 EMA)
entry_long: Price above all 3 EMAs; pullback to EMA cluster; bullish candle; enter long
entry_short: Price below all 3 EMAs; rally to EMA cluster; bearish candle; enter short
exit_tp: TP at measured move target; partial at 1R; trail with slowest EMA
stop_loss: SL below/above EMA cluster; ~1x ATR
indicator_settings: Sonic indicator: 3 EMAs (fast, medium, slow); price must SETTLE above/below
notes: Price must SETTLE (close) above/below SONIC indicator â€” not cross only

name: Camarilla Pivot Intraday Swing
entry_long: Price falls to H3 Camarilla support; bullish reversal candle; RSI < 40
entry_short: Price rises to H3 Camarilla resistance; bearish reversal candle; RSI > 60
exit_tp: TP at H3 on opposite side; exit at H4 if breakout
stop_loss: SL beyond H4 pivot level; ~15 pips on majors
indicator_settings: Camarilla calculated from prior day OHLC; RSI: 14-period
notes: H3 = reversal trade; H4 = breakout trade; know the difference

name: Engulfing + S/R Reversal
entry_long: Bullish engulfing candle at key support or demand zone; volume above average
entry_short: Bearish engulfing candle at key resistance or supply zone; volume above average
exit_tp: TP at next opposing S/R; minimum 1:2 RR
stop_loss: SL 10 pips beyond the engulfing candle low/high; ~1x ATR
indicator_settings: Engulfing must fully engulf prior candle body; volume >150% of 20-bar average
notes: Candle body must fully engulf prior body; higher probability at HTF levels
